description: Codec / resolution / HDR / audio / subtitle breakdown of the Plex library, sourced from a daily SQLite snapshot at /var/lib/grafana/plex_data/plex_snapshot.db.
title: Plex Media Analysis

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL;

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL;

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS series FROM metadata_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND metadata_type=2;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS series FROM metadata_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND metadata_type=2;

targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(size)/1099511627776.0 AS terabytes FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id IN (2,3) AND deleted_at IS NULL;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(size)/1099511627776.0 AS terabytes FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id IN (2,3) AND deleted_at IS NULL;

targets.queryText: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' OR vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc IN ('smpte2084','arib-std-b67') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id IN (2,3) AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' OR vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc IN ('smpte2084','arib-std-b67') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id IN (2,3) AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL;

targets.queryText: SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ms.extra_data LIKE '%Atmos%' THEN mi.id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT mi.id) AS pct FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams ms ON ms.media_item_id=mi.id AND ms.stream_type_id=2 WHERE mi.library_section_id IN (2,3) AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ms.extra_data LIKE '%Atmos%' THEN mi.id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT mi.id) AS pct FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams ms ON ms.media_item_id=mi.id AND ms.stream_type_id=2 WHERE mi.library_section_id IN (2,3) AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL;

targets.queryText: SELECT LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(video_codec,''),'unknown')) AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(video_codec,''),'unknown')) AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' WHEN width>0 THEN 'SD' ELSE 'unknown' END AS resolution, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY resolution ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' WHEN width>0 THEN 'SD' ELSE 'unknown' END AS resolution, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY resolution ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' THEN 'Dolby Vision' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR mi.color_trc='smpte2084' THEN 'HDR10' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc='arib-std-b67' THEN 'HLG' WHEN mi.color_trc='bt2020-10' THEN 'BT.2020' ELSE 'SDR' END AS hdr, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id=2 AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY hdr ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' THEN 'Dolby Vision' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR mi.color_trc='smpte2084' THEN 'HDR10' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc='arib-std-b67' THEN 'HLG' WHEN mi.color_trc='bt2020-10' THEN 'BT.2020' ELSE 'SDR' END AS hdr, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id=2 AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY hdr ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(container,''),'unknown') AS container, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY container ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(container,''),'unknown') AS container, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY container ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(audio_codec,''),'unknown') AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC LIMIT 12;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(audio_codec,''),'unknown') AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC LIMIT 12;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) WHEN 8 THEN '7.1 (8ch)' WHEN 7 THEN '6.1 (7ch)' WHEN 6 THEN '5.1 (6ch)' WHEN 2 THEN 'Stereo' WHEN 1 THEN 'Mono' WHEN 0 THEN 'unknown' ELSE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) || 'ch' END AS layout, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY layout ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) WHEN 8 THEN '7.1 (8ch)' WHEN 7 THEN '6.1 (7ch)' WHEN 6 THEN '5.1 (6ch)' WHEN 2 THEN 'Stereo' WHEN 1 THEN 'Mono' WHEN 0 THEN 'unknown' ELSE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) || 'ch' END AS layout, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY layout ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT bucket, files FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 'unknown' WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN '<1 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN '1-3 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN '3-5 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN '5-10 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN '10-25 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN '25-50 Mbps' ELSE '50+ Mbps' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS files, CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 9 WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN 8 WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN 7 WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN 6 WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN 5 WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN 4 WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN 3 ELSE 2 END AS ord FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY bucket, ord ) ORDER BY ord;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT bucket, files FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 'unknown' WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN '<1 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN '1-3 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN '3-5 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN '5-10 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN '10-25 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN '25-50 Mbps' ELSE '50+ Mbps' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS files, CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 9 WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN 8 WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN 7 WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN 6 WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN 5 WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN 4 WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN 3 ELSE 2 END AS ord FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY bucket, ord ) ORDER BY ord;

targets.queryText: SELECT meta.title || ' (' || COALESCE(meta.year,'?') || ')' AS title, CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' ELSE 'SD' END AS resolution, LOWER(mi.video_codec) AS codec, ROUND(mi.bitrate/1000000.0,1) AS bitrate_mbps, ROUND(mi.size/1073741824.0,1) AS size_gb FROM media_items mi JOIN metadata_items meta ON meta.id=mi.metadata_item_id WHERE mi.library_section_id=2 AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY mi.bitrate DESC LIMIT 20;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT meta.title || ' (' || COALESCE(meta.year,'?') || ')' AS title, CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' ELSE 'SD' END AS resolution, LOWER(mi.video_codec) AS codec, ROUND(mi.bitrate/1000000.0,1) AS bitrate_mbps, ROUND(mi.size/1073741824.0,1) AS size_gb FROM media_items mi JOIN metadata_items meta ON meta.id=mi.metadata_item_id WHERE mi.library_section_id=2 AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY mi.bitrate DESC LIMIT 20;

targets.queryText: SELECT LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(video_codec,''),'unknown')) AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(video_codec,''),'unknown')) AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' WHEN width>0 THEN 'SD' ELSE 'unknown' END AS resolution, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY resolution ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' WHEN width>0 THEN 'SD' ELSE 'unknown' END AS resolution, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY resolution ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' THEN 'Dolby Vision' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR mi.color_trc='smpte2084' THEN 'HDR10' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc='arib-std-b67' THEN 'HLG' WHEN mi.color_trc='bt2020-10' THEN 'BT.2020' ELSE 'SDR' END AS hdr, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id=3 AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY hdr ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' THEN 'Dolby Vision' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR mi.color_trc='smpte2084' THEN 'HDR10' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc='arib-std-b67' THEN 'HLG' WHEN mi.color_trc='bt2020-10' THEN 'BT.2020' ELSE 'SDR' END AS hdr, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items mi LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id=3 AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY hdr ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(container,''),'unknown') AS container, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY container ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(container,''),'unknown') AS container, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY container ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(audio_codec,''),'unknown') AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC LIMIT 12;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(audio_codec,''),'unknown') AS codec, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY codec ORDER BY files DESC LIMIT 12;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) WHEN 8 THEN '7.1 (8ch)' WHEN 6 THEN '5.1 (6ch)' WHEN 2 THEN 'Stereo' WHEN 1 THEN 'Mono' WHEN 0 THEN 'unknown' ELSE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) || 'ch' END AS layout, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY layout ORDER BY files DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) WHEN 8 THEN '7.1 (8ch)' WHEN 6 THEN '5.1 (6ch)' WHEN 2 THEN 'Stereo' WHEN 1 THEN 'Mono' WHEN 0 THEN 'unknown' ELSE COALESCE(audio_channels,0) || 'ch' END AS layout, COUNT(*) AS files FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY layout ORDER BY files DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT bucket, files FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 'unknown' WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN '<1 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN '1-3 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN '3-5 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN '5-10 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN '10-25 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN '25-50 Mbps' ELSE '50+ Mbps' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS files, CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 9 WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN 8 WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN 7 WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN 6 WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN 5 WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN 4 WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN 3 ELSE 2 END AS ord FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY bucket, ord ) ORDER BY ord;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT bucket, files FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 'unknown' WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN '<1 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN '1-3 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN '3-5 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN '5-10 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN '10-25 Mbps' WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN '25-50 Mbps' ELSE '50+ Mbps' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS files, CASE WHEN bitrate IS NULL OR bitrate=0 THEN 9 WHEN bitrate<1000000 THEN 8 WHEN bitrate<3000000 THEN 7 WHEN bitrate<5000000 THEN 6 WHEN bitrate<10000000 THEN 5 WHEN bitrate<25000000 THEN 4 WHEN bitrate<50000000 THEN 3 ELSE 2 END AS ord FROM media_items WHERE library_section_id=3 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY bucket, ord ) ORDER BY ord;

panels.title: Drill-down (filter via column headers — variable above selects library)
All files in selected library — full attributes
panels.description: Use Grafana's column header filters to drill down by codec, resolution, HDR, container, etc. Library selector at top.

targets.queryText: SELECT meta.title AS title, COALESCE(meta.year,0) AS year, mi.container AS container, LOWER(mi.video_codec) AS video_codec, CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' WHEN width>0 THEN 'SD' ELSE 'unknown' END AS resolution, CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' THEN 'Dolby Vision' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR mi.color_trc='smpte2084' THEN 'HDR10' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc='arib-std-b67' THEN 'HLG' WHEN mi.color_trc='bt2020-10' THEN 'BT.2020' ELSE 'SDR' END AS hdr, mi.audio_codec AS audio_codec, mi.audio_channels AS audio_channels, ROUND(mi.bitrate/1000000.0,2) AS bitrate_mbps, ROUND(mi.size/1073741824.0,2) AS size_gb, ROUND(mi.duration/60000.0,1) AS duration_min, mi.width AS width, mi.height AS height FROM media_items mi JOIN metadata_items meta ON meta.id=mi.metadata_item_id LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id=$library AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY meta.title, meta.year;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT meta.title AS title, COALESCE(meta.year,0) AS year, mi.container AS container, LOWER(mi.video_codec) AS video_codec, CASE WHEN width>=3000 THEN '4K/UHD' WHEN width>=2400 THEN '1440p' WHEN width>=1700 THEN '1080p' WHEN width>=1100 THEN '720p' WHEN width>0 THEN 'SD' ELSE 'unknown' END AS resolution, CASE WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:DOVIPresent":"1"%' THEN 'Dolby Vision' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"smpte2084"%' OR mi.color_trc='smpte2084' THEN 'HDR10' WHEN vs.extra_data LIKE '%"ma:colorTrc":"arib-std-b67"%' OR mi.color_trc='arib-std-b67' THEN 'HLG' WHEN mi.color_trc='bt2020-10' THEN 'BT.2020' ELSE 'SDR' END AS hdr, mi.audio_codec AS audio_codec, mi.audio_channels AS audio_channels, ROUND(mi.bitrate/1000000.0,2) AS bitrate_mbps, ROUND(mi.size/1073741824.0,2) AS size_gb, ROUND(mi.duration/60000.0,1) AS duration_min, mi.width AS width, mi.height AS height FROM media_items mi JOIN metadata_items meta ON meta.id=mi.metadata_item_id LEFT JOIN media_streams vs ON vs.media_item_id=mi.id AND vs.stream_type_id=1 WHERE mi.library_section_id=$library AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY meta.title, meta.year;
